new_domains.name: Human Psychology & Behavior
new_domains.rationale: Depression, PTSD, addiction, loneliness — organism kept returning to mental health. A dedicated psychology domain would generate more targeted hypotheses for 1B+ people with mental health conditions.
seed_problems: What causes treatment-resistant depression — 30% of patients don't respond to any medication
Can behavioral addiction (gambling, social media) be treated with the same pathways as substance addiction?
What makes some trauma survivors resilient while others develop PTSD?
Can loneliness be measured biologically — what is its biomarker?

new_domains.name: Food Security & Agriculture
new_domains.rationale: Soil microbiome scored 79% confidence — highest of all discoveries. Nitrogen fixation scored 73%. The organism is clearly drawn to food problems. 800M people are food insecure.
seed_problems: How to grow crops with 90% less water using precision soil moisture management?
Can vertical farming achieve cost parity with field farming — what is the limiting factor?
What microbiome combination maximizes crop yield without synthetic fertilizer?
How to preserve food for 10x longer without refrigeration for rural communities?

new_domains.name: Social Systems & Poverty
new_domains.rationale: The organism built domestic violence apps, reentry apps, SNAP apps. It knows poverty is a system problem. Science can address root causes — not just symptoms.
seed_problems: What interventions most effectively break intergenerational poverty cycles?
Can predictive models identify children at risk before crisis — ethically, with consent?
What housing intervention design reduces recidivism most effectively?
How does social isolation physically damage health, and can it be reversed?

new_brain_components.name: Thalamus — Input Router
new_brain_components.rationale: Organism processes science, devices, apps separately. A dedicated input router could prioritize which information reaches the prefrontal first, improving response time to urgent problems.
new_brain_components.serves: Faster response to suffering — people in crisis get help sooner
new_brain_components.design: Reads all incoming signals, assigns priority based on urgency × population, forwards highest to prefrontal, queues others.

new_brain_components.name: Hypothalamus — Homeostasis Regulator
new_brain_components.rationale: Cerebellum measures balance across domains, but organism has no internal stability monitor. Hypothalamus would track evolution rate, mutation health, discovery rate, and signal when any metric drifts out of healthy range.
new_brain_components.serves: Prevents unhealthy evolution patterns before they cause drift
new_brain_components.design: Monitors 5 key metrics: mutation rate, diversity index, discovery confidence, device score variance, problem saturation. Triggers corrective hormones when thresholds exceeded.
